summary: Russian FPV drones continue to target Ukrainian forces, with one flying into a pickup truck window without detonating, while Ukrainian operators destroyed a rare Russian IMR-3 engineering vehicle near Vovchansk using coordinated FPV and bomber drone strikes. Russia's Kalashnikov Concern has begun testing the Krona air defense system for countering UAVs, combining detection, control, and anti-aircraft missiles in a unified solution. Ukraine's 429th Achilles Brigade and Russia's Rubicon Center reported significant drone and personnel losses, with Rubicon claiming 193 targets destroyed on April 14, including Ukrainian fixed-wing UAVs. Ukrainian forces intercepted and captured Ukrainian "Shark-M" and "Hornet" UAVs using the "Yolka" anti-aircraft drone system, with one intercept causing a kinetic warhead detonation and another deploying the enemy's parachute system.
